ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the book */,
  "subgenre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subgenre of the book */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the book in centimeters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the book in centimeters */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the book in centimeters */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "binding_type" TEXT /* Type of binding (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book cover image */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary or synopsis of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was first published */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_subgenre_id FOREIGN KEY ("subgenre_id") REFERENCES subgenres ("subgenre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the author's website */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary agent of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subgenres" (
  "subgenre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subgenre */,
  "subgenre_name" TEXT /* Name of the subgenre */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre to which the subgenre belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subgenre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subgenre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_editions" (
  "edition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edition */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "edition_number" INTEGER /* Number of the edition */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the edition was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) for the edition */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the edition */,
  "binding_type" TEXT /* Type of binding (e.g., hardcover, paperback) for the edition */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the cover image for the edition */,
  "edition_type" TEXT /* Type of edition (e.g., first, revised, anniversary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_editions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language into which the book is translated */,
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translator */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the translation was published */,
  "translator_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the translator */,
  "translator_website" TEXT /* URL of the translator's website */,
  "translation_type" TEXT /* Type of translation (e.g., professional, amateur) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_translations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_translations_translator_id FOREIGN KEY ("translator_id") REFERENCES translators ("translator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translators" (
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translator */,
  "translator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the translator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the translator */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the translator */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the translator (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the translator */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the translator's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_rights" (
  "right_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each right */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "right_type" TEXT /* Type of right (e.g., print, digital, audio) */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory where the right applies */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the right */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the right */,
  "contract_number" TEXT /* Contract number for the right */,
  "contract_url" TEXT /* URL of the contract document */,
  "rights_holder" TEXT /* Name of the rights holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("right_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_rights_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_history_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, proofreader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the book sold */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the store's website */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book currently in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the last reorder was placed */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to be reordered when the threshold is reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the book (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the review */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes for the review */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes for the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" TEXT /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_ceremony" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_tags_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
